positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a celestial forest scene, featuring stylized, interconnected bioluminescent trees and floating abstract geometric moon pieces. The main subject is a serene, symmetrical grove bathed in soft nebula hues of deep indigo, ethereal cyan, and warm lavender. The composition is perfectly balanced and centralized, ideal for a repeating pattern print. Utilize sharp line work, clean silhouettes, and high contrast against a creamy off-white background. Art style: Modern graphic design, stylized flat vector art, Alphonse Mucha meets modern minimalist aesthetic. Focus on clean edges and scalable vector quality.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, dirty, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, photo-realistic, bokeh, deep shadows, harsh lighting
